 # Rule configurations
-cyclomatic_complexity:
-  warning: 15
-  error: 25
-  ignores_case_statements: true
-
 file_length:
   warning: 1000
   error: 2000
   ignore_comment_only_lines: true
 
-
-function_body_length:
-  warning: 120
-  error: 200
-
 function_parameter_count:
   warning: 10
   error: 15
   ignores_default_parameters: true
 
-identifier_name:
-  min_length:
-    warning: 1
-    error: 1
-  max_length:
-    warning: 50
-    error: 60
-  excluded:
-    - "id"
-    - "URL"
-    - "url"
-    - "AI"
-    - "ai"
-    - "UI"
-    - "ui"
-    - "a"
-    - "b"
-    - "x"
-    - "y"
-    - "i"
-    - "j"
+line_length:
+  warning: 140
+  error: 180
+  ignores_urls: true
+  ignores_function_declarations: true
+  ignores_comments: true
 
 implicit_return:
   included:
@@ -156,25 +131,6 @@ large_tuple:

-
-nesting:

-number_separator:

-
 trailing_comma:
